datasets.name: be1c301e
queryLines:
SELECT 
    *,
    CONCAT("https://app.uniswap.org/explore/tokens/ethereum/",pk_token_contract) AS full_uniswap_url
FROM dim_tokens
WHERE symbol != "ease.org"

datasets.name: 71d5b431
queryLines:
SELECT *
FROM dim_tokens
WHERE symbol != "ease.org"
ORDER BY volume_USD DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: 08b1aaa1
queryLines:
SELECT *
FROM dim_tokens
WHERE symbol != "ease.org"
ORDER BY tx_count DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: 10d81222
queryLines:
SELECT
    *,
    CONCAT("https://app.uniswap.org/explore/pools/ethereum/",pk_pool_contract) AS full_uniswap_url
FROM dim_pools
WHERE tvl_tier IN ("high_tvl","medium_tvl", "low_tvl")

datasets.name: 4d9bbd67
queryLines:
SELECT *
FROM dim_pools
WHERE token0_symbol != "ease.org"
ORDER BY total_value_locked_USD DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: c8858d81
queryLines:
SELECT *
FROM dim_pools
WHERE token0_symbol != "ease.org"
ORDER BY volume_USD DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: 30c4e129
queryLines:
SELECT
    swaps.*,
    pools.pair_symbol AS pool_pair_symbol,
    token0.name AS token0_name,
    token1.name AS token1_name
FROM fact_swaps AS swaps
LEFT JOIN dim_pools AS pools
    ON swaps.fk_pool_contract = pools.pk_pool_contract
LEFT JOIN dim_tokens AS token0
    ON swaps.fk_token0_contract = token0.pk_token_contract
LEFT JOIN dim_tokens AS token1
    ON swaps.fk_token1_contract = token1.pk_token_contract

datasets.name: 797c19a7
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM fact_swaps
WHERE swap_tier = "whale"

datasets.name: a44b186e
queryLines:
SELECT SUM(amount_USD) AS volume_last_30_days
FROM fact_swaps
WHERE block_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAYS

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

datasets.name: c300c2ad
queryLines:
SELECT
    positions.*,
    pools.pair_symbol,
    pools.protocol_version,
    pools.network,
    token0.name AS token0_name,
    token1.name AS token1_name
FROM dim_positions AS positions
LEFT JOIN dim_pools AS pools
    ON positions.pool_id = pools.pk_pool_contract
LEFT JOIN dim_tokens AS token0
    ON positions.token0_id = token0.pk_token_contract
LEFT JOIN dim_tokens AS token1
    ON positions.token1_id = token1.pk_token_contract

datasets.name: 8ebe42bd
queryLines:
SELECT 
    pos.*,
    pools.pair_symbol
FROM dim_positions AS pos
LEFT JOIN dim_pools AS pools
    ON pos.pool_id = pools.pk_pool_contract
ORDER BY pos.tx_timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: 326ccaab
queryLines:
WITH cte_groupby AS (
    SELECT
        pools.pk_pool_contract, count(pos.pk_position_id) AS count_positions_per_pool
    FROM dim_positions AS pos
    LEFT JOIN dim_pools AS pools
        ON pos.pool_id = pools.pk_pool_contract
    GROUP BY pools.pk_pool_contract
)
SELECT 
    source.*,
    pools.pair_symbol
FROM cte_groupby AS source
INNER JOIN dim_pools AS pools
    ON source.pk_pool_contract = pools.pk_pool_contract
ORDER BY count_positions_per_pool DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: c0962137
queryLines:
WITH cte_top_lps AS (
    SELECT
        owner_address, count(pool_id) AS count
    FROM dim_positions
    WHERE owner_address != "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000"
    GROUP BY owner_address
)
SELECT 
    *,
    CONCAT("https://etherscan.io/address/", owner_address) AS scan_lp_url
FROM cte_top_lps
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20

measures.name: Total liquidity added
measures.expr:
SUM(CASE 
        WHEN event_type = "mint" 
        THEN usd_amount
    END)

measures.name: Total liquidity removed
measures.expr:
SUM(CASE 
        WHEN event_type = "burn" 
        THEN usd_amount
    END)
